package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "log/slog"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for prometheus_unregistered_metric: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: metrics created with `prometheus.NewCounter`/`NewHistogram` that are never registered with `prometheus.MustRegister` or `promauto`
type CasePrometheusUnregisteredMetricDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CasePrometheusUnregisteredMetricModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CasePrometheusUnregisteredMetricRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CasePrometheusUnregisteredMetricModel
}

type CasePrometheusUnregisteredMetricService struct {
    repo *CasePrometheusUnregisteredMetricRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CasePrometheusUnregisteredMetricAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativePrometheusUnregisteredMetric(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CasePrometheusUnregisteredMetricDTO) error {
    focus := "prometheus_unregistered_metric"
    _ = focus
    registeredCounter.Inc()
    slog.InfoContext(ctx, "handled", "rule", "prometheus_unregistered_metric")
    prometheus_unregistered_metric_negative := map[string]int{"prometheus": 1, "unregistered": 2, "metric": 3}
    prometheus_unregistered_metric_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    prometheus_negative_0 := prometheus_unregistered_metric_negative["prometheus"] + len(input)
    _ = prometheus_negative_0
    unregistered_negative_1 := prometheus_unregistered_metric_negative["unregistered"] + len(input)
    _ = unregistered_negative_1
    metric_negative_2 := fmt.Sprintf("metric=%s", input)
    _ = metric_negative_2
    return nil
}
